description_long: This is a modern, angular shelving unit with a triangular main shelf and three additional horizontal slats beneath it, all supported by a robust vertical frame on one side and a lighter, open frame on the other. The structure is composed of two contrasting colors, with the main support and one side panel in a dark gray and the shelves and secondary supports in white. The design is open on two sides, allowing easy access to the shelves, while the back and one side are enclosed by solid panels. The shelves are flat and sturdy, suitable for holding books, decorative items, or small urban equipment. The overall form is geometric and minimalist, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or public waiting areas. The materials appear to be a combination of painted metal or wood, providing both durability and a sleek appearance.
description: A modern, angular shelving unit with a triangular main shelf and three white slats, supported by a dark gray frame. The open design and sturdy construction make it suitable for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid dark gray panel and the triangular shelf extending from it, with the open frame visible on the right.
description_view_1: Opposite side view highlighting the open white frame and the three horizontal slats beneath the main shelf.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the solid white panel and the triangular shelf, with the open frame receding into the background.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the triangular shelf shape and the arrangement of the three white slats, with both the solid and open sides visible.
